arts.ttl: Real Madrid hand a debut to a giant, but who is Fran González?
arts.sum: That’s where Fran González comes in —the usual third-choice keeper in Carletto’s call-ups—who will now be tasked with guarding Real Madrid’s goal . The former Madrid youth product—who also played for Getafe and APOEL—worked closely with Fran whenever first-team goalkeeping coach Llopis wasn’t available.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Valencia, 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Valencia in La Liga. It’s time for Real Madrid to find some sort of consistency with less than 10 games to go in the 2024-25 La Liga season.
